    Contents 
    1. Constant Field Values
      1. com.library.*

    Constant Field Values

    com.library.*

    • com.library.dao.impl.AuthorDaoImpl
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      private static final String
      COUNTRIES
      "SELECT DISTINCT country FROM authors WHERE country IS NOT NULL ORDER BY country"
      private static final String
      DELETE
      "DELETE FROM authors WHERE id=?"
      private static final String
      FIND_ALL
      "SELECT id, full_name, country, birth_year FROM authors ORDER BY full_name"
      private static final String
      FIND_BY_ID
      "SELECT id, full_name, country, birth_year FROM authors WHERE id=?"
      private static final String
      FK_VIOLATION
      "23503"
      private static final String
      INSERT
      "INSERT INTO authors (full_name, country, birth_year) VALUES (?, ?, ?)"
      private static final String
      SELECT_BASE
      "SELECT id, full_name, country, birth_year FROM authors "
      private static final String
      UPDATE
      "UPDATE authors SET full_name=?, country=?, birth_year=? WHERE id=?"
    • com.library.dao.impl.BookDaoImpl
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      private static final String
      DELETE
      "DELETE FROM books WHERE id=?"
      private static final String
      FIND_ALL
      "SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, a.full_name AS author_name, b.genre, b.isbn, b.pub_year, b.copies FROM books b JOIN authors a ON a.id = b.author_id ORDER BY b.id"
      private static final String
      FIND_BY_AUTHOR
      "SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, a.full_name AS author_name, b.genre, b.isbn, b.pub_year, b.copies FROM books b JOIN authors a ON a.id = b.author_id WHERE b.author_id = ? ORDER BY b.title"
      private static final String
      FIND_BY_ID
      "SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, a.full_name AS author_name, b.genre, b.isbn, b.pub_year, b.copies FROM books b JOIN authors a ON a.id = b.author_id WHERE b.id = ?"
      private static final String
      FK_VIOLATION
      "23503"
      private static final String
      GENRES
      "SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM books WHERE genre IS NOT NULL ORDER BY genre"
      private static final String
      INSERT
      "INSERT INTO books (title, author_id, genre, isbn, pub_year, copies) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)"
      private static final String
      SELECT_BASE
      "SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, a.full_name AS author_name, b.genre, b.isbn, b.pub_year, b.copies FROM books b JOIN authors a ON a.id = b.author_id "
      private static final String
      UPDATE
      "UPDATE books SET title=?, author_id=?, genre=?, isbn=?, pub_year=?, copies=? WHERE id=?"
    • com.library.dao.impl.LoanDaoImpl
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      private static final String
      COUNT_BY_BOOK
      "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE book_id = ?"
      private static final String
      COUNT_BY_READER
      "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE reader_id = ?"
      private static final String
      DELETE
      "DELETE FROM loans WHERE id=?"
      private static final String
      DELETE_BY_BOOK
      "DELETE FROM loans WHERE book_id = ?"
      private static final String
      DELETE_BY_READER
      "DELETE FROM loans WHERE reader_id = ?"
      private static final String
      FIND_ALL
      "SELECT l.id, l.book_id, b.title AS book_title, l.reader_id, r.full_name AS reader_name, l.loan_date, l.due_date, l.status FROM loans l JOIN books b ON b.id = l.book_id JOIN readers r ON r.id = l.reader_id ORDER BY l.id DESC"
      private static final String
      FIND_BY_ID
      "SELECT l.id, l.book_id, b.title AS book_title, l.reader_id, r.full_name AS reader_name, l.loan_date, l.due_date, l.status FROM loans l JOIN books b ON b.id = l.book_id JOIN readers r ON r.id = l.reader_id WHERE l.id=?"
      private static final String
      INSERT
      "INSERT INTO loans (book_id, reader_id, loan_date, due_date, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)"
      private static final String
      MARK_OVERDUE
      "UPDATE loans SET status = \'overdue\' WHERE status = \'active\' AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE"
      private static final String
      SELECT_BASE
      "SELECT l.id, l.book_id, b.title AS book_title, l.reader_id, r.full_name AS reader_name, l.loan_date, l.due_date, l.status FROM loans l JOIN books b ON b.id = l.book_id JOIN readers r ON r.id = l.reader_id "
      private static final String
      UPDATE
      "UPDATE loans SET book_id=?, reader_id=?, loan_date=?, due_date=?, status=? WHERE id=?"
    • com.library.dao.impl.ReaderDaoImpl
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      private static final String
      DELETE
      "DELETE FROM readers WHERE id=?"
      private static final String
      FIND_ALL
      "SELECT id, full_name, email, phone, reg_date FROM readers ORDER BY full_name"
      private static final String
      FIND_BY_ID
      "SELECT id, full_name, email, phone, reg_date FROM readers WHERE id=?"
      private static final String
      FK_VIOLATION
      "23503"
      private static final String
      INSERT
      "INSERT INTO readers (full_name, email, phone, reg_date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)"
      private static final String
      SELECT_BASE
      "SELECT id, full_name, email, phone, reg_date FROM readers "
      private static final String
      UPDATE
      "UPDATE readers SET full_name=?, email=?, phone=?, reg_date=? WHERE id=?"
